data.title: Solo Stove promotes connection over food, turning rivalries into bonds during the Big Game. NYSE: SBDS.
data.description: Solo Stove, based in Grapevine, Texas, is showcasing how fire can unite people, whether during the Big Game or in residential outdoor spaces across the country. On January 29, 2026, the company, listed on NYSE as SBDS, is making an impact in the midst of a competitive football season marked by team rivalries, intense debates, and lingering animosities. Solo Stove is presenting an innovative way to foster connections through shared experiences, one delicious smash burger at a time.

data.title: Titan appoints Blake Paulson as a new board member; adds expertise in banking industry.
data.description: In New York, Titan has recently revealed the appointment of Blake Paulson to its Board of Directors. This move is part of the company's strategic initiatives in incorporating innovative minds to enhance its operations and growth. Paulson brings a wealth of experience and expertise in the banking sector, which is expected to significantly benefit Titan. His addition marks a key milestone as the company aims to capitalize on the increasing advancements in artificial intelligence and banking technologies. This development highlights Titan's commitment to staying at the forefront of industry trends.

data.title: India's defense market expected to grow, report highlights trends, budget allocation, acquisitions, and forecasts 2025-2030.
data.description: The Indian defense market is projected to experience substantial growth in the upcoming years as per a report titled "India Defense Market - Size and Trends, Budget Allocation, Regulations, Key Acquisitions, Competitive Landscape, and Forecast, 2025-2030." This report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, provides insights into various critical factors influencing the market. It highlights key aspects such as budget allocation, regulations, important acquisitions, and the competitive landscape. The forecast indicates promising opportunities for growth in India's defense sector, showcasing a positive outlook between 2025 and 2030.

data.title: InventHelp inventors from North Vernon, Ind., develop new IMPACT ATTACHMENT accessory for screw guns to enable faster handling and driving of screws.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, two inventors from North Vernon, Indiana shared their motivation behind creating the innovative IMPACT ATTACHMENT. This new tool aims to revolutionize the process of loading and using screws with a screw gun by offering enhanced speed and efficiency. The inventors highlighted their belief in a better way to handle screws, resulting in a design that facilitates quicker screw driving. The IMPACT ATTACHMENT is poised to transform the industry by streamlining operations and enhancing productivity, making it a significant advancement in the field of tool technology.

data.title: Dominion Enterprises merges Cross-Sell into DataOne Software to boost data solutions growth in automotive market.
data.description: In Norfolk, Virginia on January 29, 2026, Dominion Enterprises revealed the merger of Cross-Sell, a top automotive market intelligence provider, into DataOne Software, a leading supplier of automotive data and software solutions. This strategic move signifies a significant transformation in the industry landscape, combining the strengths of both entities to create a powerhouse in the automotive sector. This merger brings together two key players in the market, leveraging their expertise and resources. The merger aims to capitalize on the market demand for comprehensive automotive solutions and enhance the offerings available. It is anticipated that this merger will lead to enhanced services and products, benefiting customers and stakeholders alike.

data.title: Author Nicole Hackett to release Mom Brain with Harper Muse on April 21, 2026, exploring modern motherhood themes.
data.description: Author Nicole Hackett, known for "The Perfect Ones," is set to release her second book, "Mom Brain," through Harper Muse on April 21, 2026. The storyline follows Georgia Evans as she explores a luxury resort promising life transformation and control. Drawing parallels to Liane Moriarty's "Nine Perfect Strangers," the novel challenges societal perceptions of modern motherhood, portraying "mom brain" as a strength rather than a weakness. Hackett's book aims to offer a fresh perspective on motherhood, with a focus on empowerment.

data.title: CEO Mike Wirth of Chevron discusses pragmatic discipline in Grey Matter with host Declan Kelly on Jan 29, 2026.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in New York, the latest episode of Grey Matter featured an interview with Mike Wirth, the Chairman and CEO of Chevron, by Declan Kelly, the Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Consello. They delved into the concept of pragmatic discipline in business and leadership challenges faced in overseeing a company. The episode provided insights into strategies and perspectives within the industry.

data.title: Hometap's 2026 report predicts disciplined growth in home equity industry due to demand and capital markets involvement.
data.description: In Boston, a financial technology company named Hometap has unveiled its 2026 outlook report titled "Home Equity Investments: Scaling the Next Chapter Responsibly." The company predicts a phase of controlled growth in the home equity investment sector for the upcoming year. This projection is based on the intersection of robust homeowner interest, heightened capital markets activity, and growing involvement of state-level regulations.

data.title: Inventors from High Point, N.C., developed MAGIC TOUCH WOUND CARE solution to heal deep wounds and pressure sores.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, a new innovation in wound care was introduced by inventors from High Point, North Carolina. The invention, known as MAGIC TOUCH WOUND CARE, aims to provide a better solution for healing deep wounds and pressure sores. The motivation behind the invention stemmed from personal experience, with one of the inventors sharing that their grandfather suffered from pressure sores due to neglect at a nursing facility. The new product is designed to address these issues and improve the healing process for patients.

data.title: Therap Connect streamlines data collection for Arlyn Wheelchair Scales, aiding in care documentation - Jan 29, 2026.
data.description: In Torrington, Connecticut on January 29, 2026, Therap Services, a top provider of HIPAA-compliant electronic documentation solutions for Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS), Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS), and human services sectors, is making strides. The company leads nationally in these areas, serving numerous organizations.

data.title: Nominations for 2026 Wealth Management Industry Awards open, with expanded categories highlighting innovation.
data.description: The announcement was made in New York on January 29, 2026, about the enrichment of categories focusing on innovation in partnerships, advisor intelligence, RIA leadership, recruiting, and modern storytelling. This development was revealed by Wealth Management, a prominent media and events platform catering to financial advisors and wealth management professionals.

data.title: Army & Air Force Exchange Service stores to stay open worldwide during gov. shutdown on Jan. 31 for military personnel, families, retirees, vets, and civilians.
data.description: In Dallas on January 29, 2026, it was announced that Army & Air Force Exchange Service outlets globally will continue operations for service members, military families, retirees, disabled Veterans, and Department of War and Coast Guard civilians in the event of a potential federal government shutdown on January 31.

data.title: Egan-Jones analysis offers risk lessons to investors to avoid credit failures, titled "Lessons Unlearned Avoiding the Next Tricolor."
data.description: On January 29, 2026, a financial analysis report titled "Lessons Unlearned: Avoiding the Next Tricolor" was published by Egan-Jones in New York. This analysis aims to assist institutional investors and risk managers in recognizing potential issues in transactions before significant losses occur. The report emphasizes the importance of early detection to prevent similar incidents to Tricolor, providing insights to mitigate risks effectively.

data.title: Covalent in Sunnyvale expands ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation to 60 metrology services, with headquarters in Silicon Valley.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California on January 29, 2026, a prominent provider of advanced materials characterization and failure analysis, Covalent, with its headquarters in Silicon Valley, revealed a significant development in its ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation. This expansion has increased their total number of accredited certifications to sixty.

data.title: Mondi Products™ introduces Avara Technology: a sustainable horticultural innovation promoting safety and environmental responsibility.
data.description: A cutting-edge food-grade material is establishing a new benchmark for safety, efficiency, and eco-consciousness. Introduced by Mondi Products™ from Vancouver, BC, on January 29, 2026, this innovative manufacturer is known for its patented 1020 Propagation Tray and Mini Greenhouse Humidity Dome.
